overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman game showing the character standing on an industrial dock platform during a stormy night. The scene features large cranes, distant city lights across the water, and a surveillance drone that enters the airspace midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock platform with crane structure

agents.ego_description: Batman stands still on the metal platform, surveying the stormy industrial dock area and distant city lights across the water

entered.detail: Large yellow crane structure with red accents extending over the water against the stormy sky
Metal grated walkway with blue illuminated edges where Batman is standing
Dark choppy water visible below the platform and surrounding the dock structures
Distant illuminated buildings visible through the storm haze and rain
Industrial scaffolding and cargo ship structures on the left side of the harbor

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on a metal platform overlooking a stormy industrial harbor at night. Large crane structures dominate the center background while distant city lights twinkle through the rain on the right. The scene is atmospheric with dark storm clouds and industrial lighting illuminating the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock platform under drone surveillance

events.description: surveillance drone enters the airspace and hovers in front of the crane structure

agents.ego_description: Batman remains stationary, watching the surveillance drone that has entered the area and is being tracked by the suit's UI

notable_agents.action: surveillance drone hovering in place between Batman and the crane, distance increasing from 79m to 92m

entered.detail: Flying drone with blue lights hovering in the air, tracked by the game's surveillance system

segments.scene_description: A surveillance drone enters the scene and hovers in the center of the frame between Batman and the industrial crane. The drone is illuminated with blue lights and appears to be scanning the area while the distance tracking data updates in real-time. The stormy harbor environment remains constant as Batman observes the new aerial threat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement on a stormy industrial dock that shifts from a wide atmospheric vista to a focused confrontation with a technological threat. It begins with Batman standing on a metal platform, overlooking a harbor where massive crane structures loom against a backdrop of dark storm clouds and distant, twinkling city lights. As the rain continues to fall across the industrial landscape, the perspective remains steady on the harbor's gloomy expanse. The scene then shifts as a surveillance drone glides into the center of the frame, hovering between the hero and the cranes while emitting a cold blue glow. Finally, the focus tightens on the drone as it scans the area with real-time tracking data, transforming the quiet observation of the storm into a tense standoff.
